news.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack scale system
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

news.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

news.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

news.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

news.title: Meta launched a new AI optimism ad set to a song about human extinction
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] David Bowie's song "Five Years," which Meta used in a supposedly inspiring advertisement, is about humans learning that they have five years left to live before the apocalypse.

news.title: Tesla, Alphabet stock falls as AI spending concerns spook investors
news.description: [CNBC] Both Tesla and Alphabet signaled higher spending as they invest in artificial intelligence.

news.title: Video of Donald Trump and Melania at World Cup goes viral - but there's a problem
news.description: [INDY100] A viral video has been circulating on X of US president Donald Trump complimenting his wife and first lady Melania Trump during the World Cup final. but the video is not real and was created using artificial intelligence.
